docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REBECA BOLLINGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVA GUTHMILLER IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $6251 TO THE PLAINTIFF BY VENMO OR PAYPAL. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUL-27-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,701.00 FILED BY BOLLINGER, REBECA AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHMILLER, DAVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED MAR-01-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHMILLER, DAVA
